name: Program finding or package bug
about: Register a reproducible finding and connect it to the MAESTRO backlog.

## Classification

- Severity: P0 / P1 / P2 / P3
- Technical and reversible: yes / no
- Proposed work package / Task-ID:
- Human consequence or external authorization required: yes / no

Program issues are dashboards and evidence entry points. Executable work must be represented in `continuity/PROGRAM_BACKLOG.json`; actionable findings require a correction task in `PROGRAM_FINDINGS.json`.
